source_registry.name: U.S. Nuclear Regulatory Commission (NRC)
source_registry.coverage: Regulatory notices, reactor oversight, licensing, and safety communications.

source_registry.name: U.S. Department of Energy – Office of Nuclear Energy
source_registry.coverage: Federal nuclear energy policy, programs, funding, and technical updates.

source_registry.name: DOE National Laboratories
source_registry.coverage: Lab research from INL, ORNL, PNNL, SNL, ANL, and similar DOE labs.

source_registry.name: SEC EDGAR
source_registry.coverage: Public company filings, material disclosures, and issuer statements.

source_registry.name: Company Investor Relations
source_registry.coverage: Issuer press releases, earnings materials, and investor presentations.
source_registry.note: Company IR pages are issuer-specific; record the actual issuer domain in item metadata.

source_registry.name: Reuters
source_registry.coverage: General market coverage and independently reported energy / nuclear news.

source_registry.name: World Nuclear News
source_registry.coverage: Industry trade reporting focused on nuclear power and fuel cycle developments.

source_registry.name: NucNet
source_registry.coverage: European and global nuclear industry reporting.

source_registry.name: Nuclear Engineering International
source_registry.coverage: Nuclear engineering trade reporting and analysis.

source_registry.name: ANS Nuclear Newswire
